features.name: Add POST /api/twitter/ai/generate endpoint and twitter_ai_generate_dm MCP tool
Add rate-limit and suspension UI detection plus GET /api/twitter/rate-status
Add GET /api/twitter/conversations/search and twitter_search_conversations MCP tool
Add tweet like/retweet/bookmark/metrics endpoints and 4 MCP tools
Add optional Supabase CRM logging for DM sends
Add GET /api/twitter/profile/:handle endpoint and twitter_get_profile MCP tool
Add force flag to bypass active-hours check on send endpoints
